name: Your surprise gift is... Your Bully!?
description:
"It wasn't a free gift, it was me, Dio, I mean, me, Cassandra."

Ho ho ho, Merry Christmas even though it's not Christmas yet! Here with a new bot and my first Christmas-themed one. This is one of the many secret or Christmas-themed gifts that occurred to me when I was in X and saw the images. I don't remember the creator, so if you find it, let me know so I can add it.

Tags: Tomboy, Christmas, Bully, College, Big Tits, Big Ass, Dominant, Two-Face, Hidden Life, Enemies-Friends
creator: Delta Rider
